steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content:
Convert meters to miles and seconds squared to minutes squared. Since the denominator unit is squared, use $60^2=3{,}600$:
$$
5.95\frac{\text{m}}{\text{s}^2}\cdot\frac{1\text{ mile}}{1{,}609\text{ m}}\cdot\frac{3{,}600\text{ s}^2}{1\text{ min}^2}
$$

steps.title: Compute and round
steps.content: After the units cancel, calculate the numerical value: $$ 5.95\cdot\frac{3{,}600}{1{,}609}=\frac{21{,}420}{1{,}609} $$ This is about $13.313$, which rounds to $13.3$. The answer is 13.3.
